title: orania littoralis
intro: Orania littoralis, also known as the "Cape golden cane", is a plant species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids in its extracts. The health benefits of Orania littoralis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, Orania littoralis can be consumed as a tea, or its extracts can be used in capsule or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
